subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I pour forth my sorrow and grief unto Thee, for anguish hath encompassed me upon hearing the voice of the messenger proclaiming the tidings of death [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اشکوا بثی و حزنی بما اعترانی الاحزان لما سمعت صوت الناعی ینعی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @soul; spirit after death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
